_comment: Cert Expiry — ExternalCollector (Secrets Manager API) scrape secret_expiry_warning. AI match runbook CertRotationRunbook, pattern_type=deferred, action=ROTATE_SECRET.
_comment_registry: fault_type=CERT_EXPIRY → registry.resolve() scrape 2 signal: secret_expiry_warning (ExternalCollector), service_unhealthy (K8sWatcher, optional).
